combined_text: Arthur Ashe Courage Award recipients "Arthur Ashe Courage Award recipients By Sarah Butler, CNNUpdated 6:55 AM ET, Thu July 16, 2015Photos: Arthur Ashe Courage Award recipients George Weah was the 1995 FIFA World Cup Player of the Year. He received the 2004 Arthur Ashe Courage Award for his humanitarian work in his home country, Liberi
